backstory.original: Born in The Cogs beneath Sharn's Lower City, Lazaapz's remarkable intellect elevated her to the Tradefair district, where her mechanical genius became highly sought after by the Dragonmarked Houses. Lazaapz's first invention was a functional mechanical arm to replace the one she was born without; now she leads an elite team of engineers in cutting edge research and development. Following the discovery of a mysterious Eldritch Machine, Lazaapz was brought in by House Cannith to ascertain the purpose of the device. Shortly after, both Lazaapz and the machine disappeared, never to be seen again.
backstory.display: 拉扎普兹出生于沙恩下城的齿轮城，出众的智力让她来到了贸易集市区，在那里，她的机械天才受到了龙印家族的追捧。拉扎普的第一个发明是一个功能性机械手臂，用来替代她生来就没有的手臂；现在，她带领着一支精英工程师团队从事尖端研发工作。在发现神秘的长生机器后，拉扎普被坎尼斯家族请来确定该装置的用途。不久之后，拉扎普和机器都消失了，再也没有出现过。

description.original: Lazaapz attacks and stuns the nearest enemy. Every fifth attack, she uses her Grappling Fist to pull an enemy closer to her instead.
description.display: 拉扎普攻击并眩晕距离最近的敌人。每第五次攻击，她会改为用抓钩飞拳将一名敌人拉到身边。

description.original: For a short duration, Lazaapz increases her equipment buff and deals ultimate damage.
description.display: 在短时间内，拉扎普会提升她的装备增益，并造成杀招伤害。

longDescription.original: For a short duration, Lazaapz increases her equipment buff and deals ultimate damage with her attacks.
longDescription.display: 在短时间内，拉扎普会提升她的装备增益，并用攻击造成杀招伤害。

description.original: Lazaapz increases the damage of small Champions, such as gnomes, goblins, halflings, and kobolds, based on the number of such Champions in the formation.
description.display: 拉扎普根据阵型中小个子勇士的数量，提升所有这些勇士的伤害，小个子种族包括侏儒、地精、半身人和狗头人等。

description.original: Lazaapz's armor powers up while she's not under attack, and then unleashes her fury once enemies are foolish enough to attack her.
description.display: 拉扎普没有受到攻击时，她的护甲会获得充能，然后向那些攻击她的蠢货释放她的狂怒。

description.desc: Lazaapz's posse members are dwarves and Small Champions. (Small Champions are fairy, gnome, goblin, halfling, kender, kobold, and plasmoid Champions.) Lazaapz increases the damage of her posse by $amount% for each posse member in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.

filter_targets.hero_expr: HasTag(`dwarf`) || HasTag(`gnome`) || HasTag(`goblin`) || HasTag(`halfling`) || HasTag(`kobold`) || HasTag(`plasmoid`) || HasTag(`fairy`) || HasTag(`fakesmallrace`) || HasTag(`kender`) || (GetUpgradeUnlocked(17484) && HasAttackDamageType(`melee`)) || (GetUpgradeUnlocked(17485) && HasTag(`evil`)) || (GetUpgradeUnlocked(17486) && HasTag(`control`))

effect_keys.per_hero_expr: HasTag(`dwarf`) || HasTag(`gnome`) || HasTag(`goblin`) || HasTag(`halfling`) || HasTag(`kobold`) || HasTag(`plasmoid`) || HasTag(`fairy`) || HasTag(`fakesmallrace`) || (GetUpgradeUnlocked(17484) && HasAttackDamageType(`melee`)) || (GetUpgradeUnlocked(17485) && HasTag(`evil`)) || (GetUpgradeUnlocked(17486) && HasTag(`control`))

description.desc: 拉扎普的同伙是体型较小种族的勇士，这些种族包括：矮人、仙女、侏儒、地精、半身人、坎德人、狗头人和/或等离子体。阵型中每有一名拉扎普的同伙，她会使她同伙的伤害提高 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

filter_targets.hero_expr: HasTag(`dwarf`) || HasTag(`gnome`) || HasTag(`goblin`) || HasTag(`halfling`) || HasTag(`kobold`) || HasTag(`plasmoid`) || HasTag(`fairy`) || HasTag(`fakesmallrace`) || HasTag(`kender`) || (GetUpgradeUnlocked(17484) && HasAttackDamageType(`melee`)) || (GetUpgradeUnlocked(17485) && HasTag(`evil`)) || (GetUpgradeUnlocked(17486) && HasTag(`control`))

effect_keys.per_hero_expr: HasTag(`dwarf`) || HasTag(`gnome`) || HasTag(`goblin`) || HasTag(`halfling`) || HasTag(`kobold`) || HasTag(`plasmoid`) || HasTag(`fairy`) || HasTag(`fakesmallrace`) || (GetUpgradeUnlocked(17484) && HasAttackDamageType(`melee`)) || (GetUpgradeUnlocked(17485) && HasTag(`evil`)) || (GetUpgradeUnlocked(17486) && HasTag(`control`))

tipText.original: Lazaapz works best with small species (fairy, gnome, goblin, halfling, kender, kobold and plasmoid). The more the merrier.
tipText.display: 拉扎普最适合与体型较小的种族（矮人、仙女、侏儒、地精、半身人、狗头人和/或等离子体）配合。人多力量大。

description.desc: Lazaapz has a set of Artificer Power Armor. She starts each area with $lazaapz_max_power_armour_stacks stacks of Power Armor. Damage taken by Lazaapz is decreased by a percentage equal to her current Power Armor stacks, but the armor consumes 1 stack of Power Armor each time she would take damage. Can not be decreased below 0.
拉扎普拥有一组机关术士能量护甲。她在每个区域开始时拥有 $lazaapz_max_power_armour_stacks 层能量护甲。拉扎普承受的伤害将减少，比例等同于当前能量护甲堆叠层数，但她每次受到伤害时，会消耗 1 层能量护甲。层数不会降到 0 以下。

tipText.original: Lazaapz's armor prevents her from taking some damage, and she has a Contingency Plan to repair her armor after it becomes too damaged to continue.
tipText.display: 拉扎普的护甲能使她免受部分伤害，而且她还有应急预案，可在护甲损坏到无法继续使用时进行修理。

description.desc: Lazaapz increases the max health of all other Champions by $amount% of her base max health and healing effects on all Champions are increased by $amount___2%.
拉扎普会增加所有其他勇士的最大生命值，数值相当于她基础最大生命值的 $amount%，并且对所有勇士的治疗效果提高 $amount___2%。

When Lazaapz's Power Armor stacks reach 0, her armor sends out a massive shockwave, dealing $amount___2 seconds of BUD damage to all enemies and pushing them back to the far side of the screen. Lazaapz then drops her shield and retreats to behind the formation, her armor shuts down, and she begins to repair it, taking $repair_time___2 seconds for each time the armor has shut down in the current area (including this time). Upon finishing her work, she leaps back to her original location, knocking back any enemies that she encounters on her way, grabbing her shield, and refilling her Power Armor stacks to full.

当拉扎普的能量护甲层数降至 0 时，护甲会释放出一道强力震荡波，对所有敌人造成等同于 $amount___2 秒基础杀招伤害的伤害，并将其击退至屏幕另一端。随后，拉扎普会放下护盾，撤退至阵型后方，她的护甲关闭，并开始修复。每次护甲在当前区域关闭（包括本次），需花费 $repair_time___2 秒进行修复。修复完成后，她会跃回原来的位置，击退途中的所有敌人，拿起她的盾牌，并将能量护甲层数补充至满值。
Lazaapz's posse now also includes Champions with a melee base attack and is buffed by $amount% (post-stack).
拉扎普的同伙现在也包括以近战为基本攻击的勇士，并且会获得 $amount% 的增益（堆叠后）。

specializationDescription.original: Nothing beats a sharp blade and a sturdy fist. Lazaapz calls for some melee muscle.
specializationDescription.display: 锋利的刀刃和有力的拳头能击败一切。拉扎普会叫来一些近战高手。

description.desc: Lazaapz's posse now also includes Evil Champions and is buffed by $amount% (post-stack).
拉扎普的同伙现在也包括邪恶阵营的勇士，并且会获得 $amount% 的增益（堆叠后）。

specializationDescription.original: A little villainy goes a long way. Lazaapz draws in the morally flexible to form her cabal.
specializationDescription.display: 勿以恶小而为之。拉扎普吸引来一些不太注重道德的人组成她的阴谋集团。

description.desc: Lazaapz's posse now also includes Champions with the Control role and is buffed by $amount% (post-stack).
拉扎普的同伙现在也包括拥有控制角色定位的勇士，并且会获得 $amount% 的增益（堆叠后）。

specializationDescription.original: Patience is a weapon. Lazaapz brings in the crowd-control crew to lock things down.
specializationDescription.display: 耐心是一种武器。拉扎普叫来群体控制小队控制局面。

description.desc: Lazaapz infuses the equipment of other Champions in the formation with her Artificer powers. Infused equipment has its item level increased by $amount. The equipment slot that is affected is equal to each Champions' exact distance from Lazaapz, so for example adjacent Champions (1 slot away) have their slot 1 equipment infused, while Champions 2 slots away have their slot 2 equipment infused, and so on.
拉扎普会将她的机关术士能量注入阵型中其他勇士的装备中。被注入了能量的装备物品等级会提升 $amount。具体哪个装备栏位会受到影响取决于每位勇士与拉扎普相隔的距离。比如，相邻的勇士（相隔 1 格）被注入能量的是栏位 1 的装备，而相隔 2 格的勇士被注入能量的是栏位 2 的装备，以此类推。

Lazaapz gains the Debuff role and increases Power Armor's max stacks by $amount___2. Lazaapz fires her gauntlet in a line each time she loses $frequency___4 Power Armor stacks. Enemies hit take $seconds_of_bud___4 seconds of BUD damage, gain a debuff, and are knocked back. The debuff causes enemies to take $(not_buffed amount___4)% extra damage from all sources, and stacks multiplicatively up to 5 times.

拉扎普获得“减益”角色定位，并将能量护甲的最大堆叠层数增加 $amount___2 层。每当拉扎普失去 $frequency___4 层能量护甲时，她会沿直线发射她的护手。被命中的敌人会受到等同于 $seconds_of_bud___4 秒基础杀招伤害的伤害，获得一个减益，并被击退。该减益使敌人受到的所有伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount___4)%，且以乘算方式堆叠，最多 5 层。

specializationDescription.original: Lazaapz adapts her armor to be a guardian, intending to be in the front line of conflict.
specializationDescription.display: 拉扎普把她的护甲改装成守护者，打算战斗在最前线。

description.desc: The effect of Fury of the Small is increased by $(not_buffed amount)% for each missing stack of Power Armor, stacking multiplicatively, and when an enemy is defeated Lazaapz regains one stack of Power Armor. She cannot exceed her maximum stacks this way.
每缺少一层能量护甲，小人族之怒的效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。每当敌人被击败时，拉扎普恢复一层能量护甲。通过此方式获得的能量护甲不会超过其最大层数。

specializationDescription.original: Lazaapz adapts her armor to be an infiltrator, making her excel at more subtle undertakings.
specializationDescription.display: 拉扎普把她的护甲改装成潜行者，这使得她非常擅长执行更隐秘的任务。

description.original: Sure. Except I knew I'd survive.
description.display: 必须的。虽然我之前就知道我能活下来。

description.original: There's no way they out smash me. Guaranteed.
description.display: 他们不可能打得过我，必然如此。

description.original: Not your average goblin, eh?
description.display: 不是你的普通地精，是吧？

description.original: I used to have to travel all over Sharn. The suit is ready for anything
description.display: 我曾经不得不走遍整个萨恩。这套衣服能应对一切。

description.original: Bolt on another sheet of plate and you're ready to go.
description.display: 再多拴上一件板甲，你就可以出发了。

description.original: I can see Wulfgar's bald spot! Don't tell him.
description.display: 我能看到沃夫加的秃头！别告诉他。

description.original: My strength doesn't come from my suit. It comes from my refusal to give up.
description.display: 我的力量并非来自于我的衣服，而是来源于我绝不放弃。

description.original: You shouldn't underestimate people smaller than you!
description.display: 你不应该低估比你矮小的人！

description.original: A true artificer knows how to get the most out of their equipment!
description.display: 真正的工匠知道如何把设备的性能发挥到极致！

effects.description: Increases Lazaapz's maximum Power Armor stacks by $amount

description.original: Keep them back! I need to do some quick repairs!
description.display: 挡住他们！我得赶紧修一下！

description.original: If I'm going down, I'm taking all of you with me!
description.display: 如果我要完蛋了，那就大家一起完蛋！

description.original: Hand me that piece of junk! I can make it better!
description.display: 把那破烂递给我！我能把它变得更好！

name.display: 你的朋友就是我的朋友

description.original: I love meeting new people and finding out what we both hate.
description.display: 我喜欢认识新朋友，找出我们都讨厌的东西。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Lazaapz's first set of Specializations by $amount%

description.original: Every time I destroy something I don't like, I feel better!
description.display: 每当我毁掉一些我不喜欢的东西时，我都会感觉好多了！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Lazaapz's first set of Specializations by $amount%

description.original: Put me in a cave with a box of scraps and I can build almost anything!
description.display: 把我和一箱废料放在一个山洞里，我几乎可以造出任何东西！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Lazaapz's second set of Specializations by $amount%

description.original: The Mark Two has a shortened delay between launches. More BOOMS, faster!
description.display: 二代型号发射间隔更短。爆炸更多、更快！

effects.description: Increases the frequency of Lazaapz's Gauntlet Launcher from her Guardian Specialization by 5

description.original: The Mark Three was a breakthrough in breaking through things. BIGGER BOOMS!
description.display: 三代型号在打破东西方面打破了技术壁垒。爆炸更大！

effects.description: Increases the BUD damage of Lazaapz's Gauntlet Launcher from her Guardian Specialization by 100%

description.original: HEY, YOU! YEAH, YOU! YOU LOOK STUPID!
description.display: 喂，你！对，就你！你一脸蠢样！

description.original: Let's GO! I feel GREAT! I could break stuff all DAY!
description.display: 上啊！我感觉好极了！我可以一整天都砸东西！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Lazaapz's first set of Specializations by $amount%

character_sheet_details.backstory: Born in The Cogs beneath Sharn's Lower City, Lazaapz's remarkable intellect elevated her to the Tradefair district, where her mechanical genius became highly sought after by the Dragonmarked Houses. Lazaapz's first invention was a functional mechanical arm to replace the one she was born without; now she leads an elite team of engineers in cutting edge research and development. Following the discovery of a mysterious Eldritch Machine, Lazaapz was brought in by House Cannith to ascertain the purpose of the device. Shortly after, both Lazaapz and the machine disappeared, never to be seen again.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Lazaapz is a tanking/support Champion whose powerful artificer armor makes them virtually immune to damage, until it doesn't, of course.

event_upgrades.name: Fury of the Small
event_upgrades.description: Lazaapz increases the damage of small Champions, such as gnomes, goblins, halflings, and kobolds, based on the number of such Champions in the formation.

event_upgrades.name: Power Armor
event_upgrades.description: Lazaapz's armor powers up while she's not under attack, and then unleashes her fury once enemies are foolish enough to attack her.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 拉扎普兹出生于沙恩下城的齿轮城，出众的智力让她来到了贸易集市区，在那里，她的机械天才受到了龙印家族的追捧。拉扎普的第一个发明是一个功能性机械手臂，用来替代她生来就没有的手臂；现在，她带领着一支精英工程师团队从事尖端研发工作。在发现神秘的长生机器后，拉扎普被坎尼斯家族请来确定该装置的用途。不久之后，拉扎普和机器都消失了，再也没有出现过。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 拉扎普是一名坦克/支援型勇士，她的机关术士护甲让她几乎免疫伤害——当然了，当护甲撑不住时，这种免疫就会失效。

event_upgrades.name: 小人族之怒
event_upgrades.description: 拉扎普根据阵型中小个子勇士的数量，提升所有这些勇士的伤害，小个子种族包括侏儒、地精、半身人和狗头人等。

event_upgrades.name: 能量护甲
event_upgrades.description: 拉扎普没有受到攻击时，她的护甲会获得充能，然后向那些攻击她的蠢货释放她的狂怒。

original.long_description: For a short duration, Lazaapz increases her equipment buff and deals ultimate damage with her attacks.

display.name: 灵光乍现
display.description: 在短时间内，拉扎普会提升她的装备增益，并造成杀招伤害。
display.long_description: 在短时间内，拉扎普会提升她的装备增益，并用攻击造成杀招伤害。

original.name: Fury of the Brawl

original.specialization_description: A little villainy goes a long way. Lazaapz draws in the morally flexible to form her cabal.

display.specialization_description: 勿以恶小而为之。拉扎普吸引来一些不太注重道德的人组成她的阴谋集团。

display.name: 停顿之怒

original.specialization_description: Lazaapz adapts her armor to be a guardian, intending to be in the front line of conflict.

display.name: 守护者
display.specialization_description: 拉扎普把她的护甲改装成守护者，打算战斗在最前线。

original.name: Infiltrator
original.specialization_description: Lazaapz adapts her armor to be an infiltrator, making her excel at more subtle undertakings.

display.name: 潜行者
display.specialization_description: 拉扎普把她的护甲改装成潜行者，这使得她非常擅长执行更隐秘的任务。

original.name: Selflessness
original.description: Sure. Except I knew I'd survive.

display.name: 无私
display.description: 必须的。虽然我之前就知道我能活下来。

original.name: Inspiring Leader
original.description: There's no way they out smash me. Guaranteed.

display.name: 鼓舞人心的首领
display.description: 他们不可能打得过我，必然如此。

original.name: Tough
original.description: Not your average goblin, eh?

display.name: 坚韧
display.description: 不是你的普通地精，是吧？

original.name: Resilient
original.description: I used to have to travel all over Sharn. The suit is ready for anything

display.name: 韧性
display.description: 我曾经不得不走遍整个萨恩。这套衣服能应对一切。

original.name: Towering Height
original.description: I can see Wulfgar's bald spot! Don't tell him.

display.name: 身高优势
display.description: 我能看到沃夫加的秃头！别告诉他。

original.name: Arcane Heights
original.description: My strength doesn't come from my suit. It comes from my refusal to give up.

display.name: 奥术高度
display.description: 我的力量并非来自于我的衣服，而是来源于我绝不放弃。

original.name: Heavily Armored
original.description: Bolt on another sheet of plate and you're ready to go.

display.name: 重甲
display.description: 再多拴上一件板甲，你就可以出发了。

original.name: Kneecapper
original.description: You shouldn't underestimate people smaller than you!

display.name: 碎膝者
display.description: 你不应该低估比你矮小的人！

original.name: Overclock
original.description: A true artificer knows how to get the most out of their equipment!

effects.description: Increases Lazaapz's maximum Power Armor stacks by $amount

display.name: 超频
display.description: 真正的工匠知道如何把设备的性能发挥到极致！

effects.description: 拉扎普的能量护甲堆叠层数上限提高 $amount。

original.name: Panic Button
original.description: Keep them back! I need to do some quick repairs!

display.name: 紧急按钮
display.description: 挡住他们！我得赶紧修一下！

original.name: Emergency Protocol
original.description: If I'm going down, I'm taking all of you with me!

display.name: 紧急协议
display.description: 如果我要完蛋了，那就大家一起完蛋！

original.name: Enhanced Infusion
original.description: Hand me that piece of junk! I can make it better!

display.name: 强化灌注
display.description: 把那破烂递给我！我能把它变得更好！

original.name: Friendly Fury
